= Dutch Defence =
===1...f5===
Black's opening move aims to transpose into a Dutch Defence. [[/2. d4|2.d4]] gives a main-line Dutch, while [[/2. c4|2.c4]] and [[/2. g3|2.g3]] reserve options.

A major independent option is [[/2. e4|2.e4]]. The sacrifice of White's e-pawn is borrowed from the [[../../1. d4/1...f5/2. e4|Staunton Gambit]], but the positional themes are very different since here White's king's knight can reach g5.

[[/2. d3|2.d3]] is a way of preparing e4.

==Theory table==

* 2.[[/2. c4|c4]]
* 2.[[/2. g3|g3]]
* 2.[[/2. e4|e4]]
